'''竏嗄-th-w''' ('''kamathaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vow|vow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vow|vow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-th-w
|-
! Lemma
| kamathaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathaw|thimathaw]] || [[word:jimathaw|jimathaw]] || [[word:shimathaw|shimathaw]] || [[word:kimathaw|kimathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathaw|thuthumathaw]] || [[word:jujumathaw|jujumathaw]] || [[word:shushumathaw|shushumathaw]] || [[word:kukumathaw|kukumathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumathaw|thumathaw]] || [[word:jumathaw|jumathaw]] || [[word:shumathaw|shumathaw]] || [[word:kumathaw|kumathaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumathaw|thumathaw]] || [[word:jumathaw|jumathaw]] || [[word:shumathaw|shumathaw]] || [[word:kumathaw|kumathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themathaw|themathaw]] || [[word:jemathaw|jemathaw]] || [[word:shemathaw|shemathaw]] || [[word:kemathaw|kemathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomathaw|thothomathaw]] || [[word:jojomathaw|jojomathaw]] || [[word:shoshomathaw|shoshomathaw]] || [[word:kokomathaw|kokomathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomathaw|thomathaw]] || [[word:jomathaw|jomathaw]] || [[word:shomathaw|shomathaw]] || [[word:komathaw|komathaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomathaw|thomathaw]] || [[word:jomathaw|jomathaw]] || [[word:shomathaw|shomathaw]] || [[word:komathaw|komathaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]] || [[word:mathaw|mathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmathaw|thﾃｦmathaw]] || [[word:jﾃｦmathaw|jﾃｦmathaw]] || [[word:shﾃｦmathaw|shﾃｦmathaw]] || [[word:kﾃｦmathaw|kﾃｦmathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamathaw|thathamathaw]] || [[word:jajamathaw|jajamathaw]] || [[word:shashamathaw|shashamathaw]] || [[word:kakamathaw|kakamathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamathaw|thamathaw]] || [[word:jamathaw|jamathaw]] || [[word:shamathaw|shamathaw]] || [[word:kamathaw|kamathaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamathaw|thamathaw]] || [[word:jamathaw|jamathaw]] || [[word:shamathaw|shamathaw]] || [[word:kamathaw|kamathaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamathaw|shamathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamathaw|goshamathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamathaw|gokishamathaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamathawnﾃｼ|shamathawnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamathawnknﾃｼ|goshamathawnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathawnﾃｼ|gokishamathawnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamathawshﾃｫ|shamathawshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamathawnkshﾃｫ|goshamathawnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamathawshﾃｫ|gokishamathawshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathawro|shamathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathawnkro|goshamathawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathawro|gokishamathawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathawmu|shamathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathawnkmu|goshamathawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathawmu|gokishamathawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamathawsher|shamathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamathawnksher|goshamathawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamathawsher|gokishamathawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamathawng|shamathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamathawnkng|goshamathawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamathawng|gokishamathawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamathawya|shamathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamathawnkya|goshamathawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamathawya|gokishamathawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamathawyam|shamathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamathawnkyam|goshamathawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamathawyam|gokishamathawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathawnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shamathawnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathawnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshamathawnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathawnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishamathawnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathawnﾃｼro|shamathawnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathawnknﾃｼro|goshamathawnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathawnﾃｼro|gokishamathawnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathawnﾃｼmu|shamathawnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathawnknﾃｼmu|goshamathawnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathawnﾃｼmu|gokishamathawnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathawshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shamathawshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathawnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshamathawnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathawshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishamathawshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathawshﾃｫro|shamathawshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathawnkshﾃｫro|goshamathawnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathawshﾃｫro|gokishamathawshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathawshﾃｫmu|shamathawshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathawnkshﾃｫmu|goshamathawnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathawshﾃｫmu|gokishamathawshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathawronﾃｼ|shamathawronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathawnkronﾃｼ|goshamathawnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathawronﾃｼ|gokishamathawronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathawroshﾃｫ|shamathawroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathawnkroshﾃｫ|goshamathawnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathawroshﾃｫ|gokishamathawroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamathawromu|shamathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamathawnkromu|goshamathawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamathawromu|gokishamathawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamathawmunﾃｼ|shamathawmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamathawnkmunﾃｼ|goshamathawnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamathawmunﾃｼ|gokishamathawmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamathawmushﾃｫ|shamathawmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamathawnkmushﾃｫ|goshamathawnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamathawmushﾃｫ|gokishamathawmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamathawmuro|shamathawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamathawnkmuro|goshamathawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamathawmuro|gokishamathawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
